This is my first bot… It might be total garbage I'm crazy for this man.

This bot was originally for private use, but since Gachiakuta fans (me) are starving for bots, I made it public.

For that same reason (and also because it’s my first bot), there might be some mistakes I missed. ;__;

I want and need to make more Gachiakuta bots, but I doubt I'll manage to make one in less than two months, so... lol.

Due to the large amount of tokens, I recommend using a proxy. This bot has been tested with DeepSeek V1.

⚠️ : English is not my first language. There might be grammar mistakes, coherence issues, or variations in pronouns. Sorry about that.
